title: The Little Rabbit
paragraph: The little rabbit jumped over the log. It was a sunny day. The rabbit played in the grass. It had lots of fun.

title: Red Balloon
paragraph: The red balloon floated into the blue sky. A girl watched it go up. She was very happy. The balloon went higher and higher.

title: Tiny Bird
paragraph: A tiny bird sang a happy song. It sat on a branch. The sun was warm. Other birds came to listen.
